stemHtml:
An aircraft descends from flight level 180 to ground level. In the table the W/V at various flight levels in the area are given.

Ground level: 260° / 25 kts
FL30 270° / 30 kts
FL60 270° / 35 kts
FL90 270° / 40 kts
FL120 280° / 50 kts

Which W/V should be used to solve descent problems e.g. the calculation of the GS from TAS and the Track in descent?
